subcodes.first_line: At the hour when the Sun in the heaven of being cast aside the veil of manifestation from Its countenance, and the Moon of the divine Purpose donned Its covering of limitations [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: در ساعتی که شمس سماء وجود برقع شهود از رخ برانداخت و قمر عماء مقصود مقنع حدود
subcodes.subjects: @symbolism, @love of God, @transcendence; unknowability of God, @wine as symbol of spiritual transformation
